title: Local laws
doc_html:
§599.19. Local laws

            An authority is subject to any local:

            (1) Land use controls.

            (2) Permitting processes for construction, demolition, or repair of a property.

            (3) Zoning laws.

            Acts 2025, No. 443, §1.
doc_text:
§599.19. Local laws
An authority is subject to any local:
(1) Land use controls.
(2) Permitting processes for construction, demolition, or repair of a property.
(3) Zoning laws.
Acts 2025, No. 443, §1.
